title: June 7
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|June|hide31=yes}}

'''June 7''' is the 158th day of the year (159th in leap years), with 207 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1940s#1943|1943]] – [[Michael Pennington]] is born.
*[[1940s#1949|1949]] – [[Larry Hama]] is born.
*[[1950s#1952|1952]] – [[Liam Neeson]] is born.
*1952 – [[Rick Hoberg]] is born.
*[[1960s#1969|1969]] – [[Francis Magee]] is born.
*[[1972]] – [[Karl Urban]] is born.
*[[1974]] – [[Dave Filoni]] is born.
*[[1977]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 3|''Star Wars'' (1977) 3]] published. The cover date is September.
*[[1978]] – [[Bill Hader]] is born.
*1978 – [[Star Wars Weekly 18|''Star Wars Weekly'' 18]] published.
*[[1986]] – The [[Star Wars: Droids: The Adventures of R2-D2 and C-3PO|''Star Wars Droids'']] special ''[[The Great Heep]]'' premiered.
*1986 – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 155|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 155]] published.
*[[1987]] – [[Daniel Scheinert]] is born.
*[[1994]] – [[Classic Star Wars 20|''Classic Star Wars'' 20]] is published.
*[[2000]] – [[Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron: Masquerade (TPB)|''Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron: Masquerade'']] published.
*[[2006]] – ''[[Star Wars Omnibus: X-Wing Rogue Squadron Volume 1]]'' published.
*2006 – [[Star Wars: Legacy (2006) 0|''Star Wars: Legacy'' (2006) 0]] published.
*[[2015]] – [[Christopher Lee]] dies.
*[[2016]] – ''[[The Adventures of BB-8]]'' published.
*2016 – ''[[Finn's Mission]]'' published.
*[[2017]] – [[Darth Vader (2017) 1|''Darth Vader'' (2017) 1]] published.
*2017 – [[Rogue One Adaptation 3|''Rogue One Adaptation'' 3]] published.
*2017 – ''[[Star Wars Vol. 2]]'' published.
*2017 – [[Star Wars Rebels Magazine 32|''Star Wars Rebels'' Magazine 32]] published.
*[[2019]] – "[[Chewie and Ewoks - Hijacking a Walker]]" airs on YouTube.
*[[2022]] – ''[[Stories of Jedi and Sith]]'' published.
*2022 – ''[[From a Certain Point of View: The Empire Strikes Back]]'' published in paperback.
*2022 – ''[[LEGO Star Wars Awesome Vehicles]]'' published.
*2022 – ''[[Star Wars: The Mandalorian: A Search-and-Find Book]]'' published.
*2022 – [[Star Wars Insider 211|''Star Wars Insider'' 211]] published.
*[[2023]] – [[Return of the Jedi – The Empire 1|''Return of the Jedi – The Empire'' 1]] published.
*2023 – [[Star Wars (2020) 35|''Star Wars'' (2020) 35]] published.
*2023 – [[Yoda 8|''Yoda'' 8]] published.
<noinclude>
